---
title: "Best Paper Award at ASEAN Economic Congress"
description: "Carbon-pricing paper by Rachmania and Prabowo wins Best Paper at the 2026 ASEAN Economic Congress."
date: "2026-03-20"
categories: [award]
author: "DEN Economics Lab"
---

Congratulations to **Dinda Rachmania** and **Yudo Prabowo**, whose paper

> *Carbon Pricing in a Developing Economy: Labour Market and Distributional Effects*

received the Best Paper Award at the **2026 ASEAN Economic Congress** held in
Kuala Lumpur.

The paper uses a CGE model calibrated to the Indonesian input-output table to
assess how alternative carbon-pricing schemes affect wages, employment, and the
income distribution across sectors.
